description: Letter from Barhun b. Salih Tāhartī in Fustat to his cousin and partner, Barhun b. Moshe Tāhartī in Alexandria, reporting about merchandise sold in Fustat and requesting that more be bought in Alexandria. He also has some personal requests. The letter was written over a period of five days. It also deals with the market fluctuations for the period. In a postscript Nahray b. Nissim writes that he is moving from the Tāhartīs' house into a rented space of his own. This indicates a dating of the latter around 1050, from the early years of Nahray's involvement in the commercial life of Fustat after his arrival there ca. 1045. (Information from Goitein's index card)
description_he: מכתב מברהון ב' צאלח תאהרתי בפוסטאט לבן דודו ושותפו ברהון ב' מוסא תאהרתי באלכסנדריה, מדווח על סחורות שנמכרו ומבקש לקנות עוד. בפוסטקריפטום: נהריי ב' נסים מודיע שעובר לשכור דיור עצמאי, מה שמתארך את המכתב לכ-1050.
